task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for dedup.py open in an editor. The deduplicate_records function should be modified to use an efficient data structure like a set or dict to track seen items, avoiding O(n^2) list lookups.
Look for aggregate.py open in an editor. The aggregate_by_category function should be modified to use a dictionary or collections.defaultdict to accumulate values in a single pass (O(n)).
Look for topk.py open in an editor. The top_k_by_value function should be modified to use a heap (e.g., heapq.nlargest) for O(n log k) complexity instead of sorting the entire list.
Look for join.py open in an editor. The inner_join function should be modified to build a hash map (dictionary) from one dataset to achieve O(n+m) complexity instead of nested loops.
